audit_items.proof_trace: TOCTOU race: hasSeenDataColumnIndex check (L157) happens during validation, but setSeenDataColumnIndex (subscriber_data_column_sidecar.go:42) only executes after ValidationAccept is returned and the handler runs. Two identical sidecars arriving concurrently both pass the check before either is marked as seen, allowing duplicate acceptance.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker broadcasts two identical data column sidecars to different peers; both arrive at victim node simultaneously, pass validation concurrently (both see cache miss), both return ValidationAccept before either marks the tuple as seen in the cache, resulting in duplicate acceptance.
